nus are seen in this planet.
Like Venus: a poet, singer, fine arts, perception in the ability of art.
Like Jupiter :religious discourses and debates, love of religion and Shastras and material
gains.
If Neptune is afflicted: then a traitor, treacherous, cheat, spying, thief, dacoit, burglar,
smuggler, black money, etc.
If Neptune makes a good aspect with a strong planet, then the native experiences good
results.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
16

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
If the planet aspecting Neptune is weak and Neptune’s aspect is good then one experiences
very little results.
If Paribhraman Neptune makes bad aspects with a strong planet in the natal chart, then
there may not be adverse results.
